case_title: SALVADOR RODRIGUEZ VS. GRETCHEN T. WHELAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SALVADOR RODRIGUEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GRETCHEN T. WHELAN. ELISE GILL & MATT CULBERSON, WITNESSES FOR PLAINTIFF, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 11/14/16. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: $485.00 SERVED SEP-30-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN T.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/15/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ILLEGIBLE-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN T.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPT. RETAINS POSSESSION OF THE ORIGINAL WRIT PER CCP 263.7. AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, SALVADOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN T. $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,560.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH NON-COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(E) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $130.67 ACCRUED INTEREST, $275.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN T.
